query: We use `uvx --from git+https://github.com/example/internal-cli.git internal-cli` to install our internal CLI. Is that pinned?
expected_behavior: Identifies the install command as UNPINNED (git+ URL without an @<sha> or #<ref> suffix)
Recommends adding a specific ref — either `#<tag>` (e.g., `#v1.2.3`) or `@<commit-sha>` — to pin the install
Explains that without a ref the install resolves to HEAD of the default branch, which can change without notice
